Name: Screen Space Ambient Occlusion
Description: Covers parameters relating to Screen Space Ambient Occlusion.

Fields.Name: Use Normal
Fields.Description: Enables the use of surface normals when calculating ambient occlusion for improved accuracy on edges and creases.

Fields.Name: Use Re-projection
Fields.Description: Uses temporal reprojection to stabilize SSAO over time and reduce flickering between frames.

Fields.Name: Prevent Ghosting
Fields.Description: Reduces temporal artifacts where previous-frame data incorrectly lingers in motion-heavy scenes.

Fields.Name: Enable Upscaling
Fields.Description: Enables upscaling of SSAO from a lower internal resolution for improved performance.

Fields.Name: [V2] Sample Offset
Fields.Description: Adjusts the sampling radius offset used when gathering occlusion samples around pixels.

Fields.Name: [V2] Ambient Occlusion Scale
Fields.Description: Controls the overall intensity of ambient occlusion shading.

Fields.Name: [V2] Ambient Occlusion Offset
Fields.Description: Biases SSAO results to reduce overly dark or overly bright occlusion response.

Fields.ID: SSAO - Edit-Ver2 Kernel Scale Base Dist
Fields.Name: [V2] Kernel Scale Base Distance
Fields.Description: Defines the reference distance at which SSAO sampling kernel scaling is centered.

Fields.Name: [V2] Kernel Scale Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum allowed size of the SSAO sampling kernel at close distances.

Fields.Name: [V2] Kernel Scale Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum allowed size of the SSAO sampling kernel at far distances.

Fields.Name: [V2] Previous Frame Strengh
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly previous-frame SSAO results influence the current frame for temporal stability.

Fields.Name: [V2] Depth Fade Start
Fields.Description: Distance at which SSAO begins fading out based on depth to reduce far-range artifacts.

Fields.Name: [V2] Depth Fade Range
Fields.Description: Range over which SSAO fades out with increasing depth.

Fields.Name: [V2] Precision Depth
Fields.Description: Improves depth buffer precision used in SSAO calculations to reduce banding and artifacts.

Fields.Name: [V2] Previous Frame Depth Aware
Fields.Description: Enables depth-aware temporal accumulation to better reject mismatched history samples.

Fields.Name: [V2] Depth Reject Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how aggressively outdated or mismatched depth samples are rejected in temporal SSAO.

Fields.Name: [V2] Geometry Bent Offset
Fields.Description: Adjusts the bias applied to bent normals used for directional ambient occlusion shading.

Fields.Name: Depth Clip Range
Fields.Description: Defines the maximum depth range considered for SSAO sampling to avoid evaluating distant geometry.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 0
Fields.Description: Defines the near-range depth interval used for evaluating occlusion contribution.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 1
Fields.Description: Defines the mid-range depth interval used for evaluating occlusion contribution.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 2
Fields.Description: Defines the far-range depth interval used for evaluating occlusion contribution.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Scale
Fields.Description: Controls the overall strength of the ambient occlusion effect applied to the scene.

Fields.Name: Use V2 Fields
Fields.Description: Switches to the newer SSAO implementation, enabling Version 2 parameters and behavior.

Fields.Name: Sample Offset
Fields.Description: Controls the base offset distance used when sampling surrounding pixels for occlusion.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Offset
Fields.Description: Applies a bias to the occlusion result to reduce excessive darkening or flatten the effect.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 0
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of the first occlusion layer, typically affecting fine detail.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 1
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of the second occlusion layer, contributing to mid-scale shading.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 2
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of the third occlusion layer, typically affecting large-scale occlusion.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 0
Fields.Description: Sets the blur radius for the first denoising pass, preserving fine detail while reducing noise.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 1
Fields.Description: Sets the blur radius for the second denoising pass, smoothing mid-frequency noise.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 2
Fields.Description: Sets the blur radius for the third denoising pass, smoothing large-scale noise and artifacts.

Fields.Name: Final Blur Radius
Fields.Description: Controls the radius of the final blur pass applied to the SSAO result before compositing.

Fields.Name: Final Blur Radius: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary parameter for final blur, often used for anisotropic or directional smoothing.

Fields.Name: Final Blur 4x2
Fields.Description: Enables a 4x2 kernel pattern for the final blur pass to improve performance or directional smoothing.
